entry.title: My Moon My Man
entry.summary:
Author: Icecoffeeistogood

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 832Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: “ You have bewitched me, body and soul, and I love, I love, I love you.I never wish to be parted from you from this day on” - Jane Austen

entry.title: cold hands warm steel
entry.summary:
Author: northernsealight

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,457Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: "The court spared you the fate of death, but you felt the pressed confinement of the coffin and the bitter taste of dirt in your mouth all the same."__________ or: on dying, ghosts, empty castles, and the knight sworn to your side trailing a mile of blood behind him.

entry.title: The Art of Loving
entry.summary:
Author: flourishedpeony

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,448Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 14

Summary: The space between anxiety and peace has always felt out of reach to the owner of Margins & Pages. But when Jason Todd—vigilante, bookworm, and the most patient man you’ve ever met—starts leaving notes in the margins of your books, something changes—you begin to learn the art of loving, Or, different snapshots of the readers’ and Jason’s relationship throughout time.

entry.title: The Odd Tea Shop in Crime Alley
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,930Chapters: 4/25Kudos: 104

Summary: Across the street from Jason’s apartment in Park Row, a budding sign of hope caught his eye. A simple signage: Opening Soon! Tea Brews and Books.Only, he almost fistfights the snarky tea shop owner at a book sale. Then, rescues her from a mugger or three as Red Hood.Uncoincidentally, his family gets interested in the tea shop and plagues Jason with their existence both mask-on and mask-off. Coincidentally, said tea shop owner has the biggest crush on Red Hood. Now, how the hell was Jason supposed to compete with himself?

entry.summary:
Author: liasnotepad

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,371Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: Ice skating was the only thing that made you feel like you were in control of your own life. You had just taken a break to drink a cup of water when your friend, Dick, called you. – Can you teach my brother, Jason, how to skate?

entry.title: It's Raining Red Hood's
entry.summary:
Author: CloakedAlias

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,326Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: He glares at you for a second, before huffing confidently and moving again. He does manage to stand this time, gripping the worn metal railing tightly the whole way up. When he turns back around to face you, there's an air of foolish confidence around him as he cocks his head to the side and chuckles, letting go of the railing.   "See? I'm fine. I don't need some civilians help with—"   His dramatic, lone-wolf speech is cut short by a dizzy spell, and he tumbles forward enough that you have to reach out and grab his arms to steady him again.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Baby bump
entry.summary:
Author: Kandyscorner

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,361Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 567

Summary: requested on tumblr:okay so the reader finding out she’s pregnant with Jason’s baby but doesn’t want to tell him because she’s scared of his reaction and tries to leave without telling him but he finds out anyway? (could it be angst to fluff and include the batfamily?) More has been added. Girl Dad! Jason Todd to follow.

entry.title: En Memoria
entry.summary:
Author: serpentinez

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,441Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Oh buen Jesús, que durante toda tu vida te compadeciste de los dolores ajenos, mira con misericordia las almas de nuestros seres queridos que están en el Purgatorio. Oh Jesús, que amaste a los tuyos con gran predilección, escucha la súplica que te hacemos, y por tu misericordia concede a aquellos que Tú te has llevado de nuestro hogar el gozar del eterno descanso en el seno de tu infinito amor. Amén

entry.title: Red Web
entry.summary:
Author: himekaida (AshTree95)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,239Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 26

Summary: Your world crumbles the moment you’re freed from General Dreykov’s control. Thrown across dimensions and stripped of everything familiar, you land in Gotham with one goal: survive. You build something fragile in the chaos—a system, a routine, a web that keeps you alive. Then Red Hood tears straight through it. And suddenly, survival isn’t the only thing at stake. You start as a problem. You become something he can’t ignore.

entry.title: You Pretty Boys Are Only Good For One Thing
entry.summary:
Author: Anxe_m

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,077Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Gotham is not a city that believes in mercy.Especially not for people like you.New. Unfamiliar. Easy to break.Your first assignment as an agent was supposed to be simple.Instead, it dropped you here. into a city where the shadows feel alive and the nights stretch a little too long.You’ve heard the stories, read news articles.About Batman.But Gotham isn’t just his city.You’ll learn that soon enough.

entry.title: More to love
entry.summary:
Author: TalesfromtheTrying

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,134Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 84

Summary: This is a drabble/headcannon that I did in 30 minutes because I was procrastinating. Based on a half-cooked headcannon that I have. I make no apologies. After a lifetime of hard and cruel things, Jason Todd has a preference for soft things. Especially in the romance department.

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 114,952Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 698

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"
